history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I need to avoid it and choose a safe direction first. Turning down is not possible yet without changing orientation, and the safest immediate move is to turn right to face down so I can look for a path around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe (`.`), so the best next step is to move forward toward the open path leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward would go to row 04 column B, which is safe, and it keeps me progressing toward the lower rows. I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 05 column B is safe, while the lava cells in column C and others nearby should be avoided. Moving forward keeps me on a safe path toward the open area and the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B, facing down (`v`). The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column B is safe (`.`), while the left/right options are not immediately needed. The goal is below and to the right, so the safest next step is to move forward and continue through the open path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 07 column B is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safe path to the goal at row 08 column H is to move right along row 06, so I need to face right first by turning counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B, facing right. The safe path to the goal at row 08 column H is to move forward along row 06, since the cells ahead are open and the lava is in other columns. I should advance toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column C facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead, row 06 column D, is safe floor, so moving forward brings me closer to the open path toward the goal at row 08 column H while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column D, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The path to the right on row 06 is safe across D, E, F, G, H, so the best next step is to move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column E, facing right (`>`). The goal `G` is at row 08 column H. Moving forward from here goes to row 06 column F, which is safe, and it keeps me progressing toward the goal. 
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column F facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward would take me to G, which is safe, and it keeps me on a direct path toward the goal. 
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column G, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H, which is below and one step to the right. Moving forward would go to H06, which appears safe, and it brings me closer to the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H, facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H, so I need to move downward toward it, but first I must not move into the wall on the right. To head down, I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H facing down. The cell directly in front of me is row 07 column H, which is safe (`.`). Moving forward progresses me toward the goal at row 08 column H, so the next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column H facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 08 column H is the goal `G`, and it is safe to enter. I should move forward to reach the goal.

<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
